mapper.sql: id, agency_name, agency_type, contact_person, contact_phone, supply_type, intern_post, bank_account_name, bank_name, bank_account, service_fee_mode, service_fee_amount, settle_cycle, tax_type, agency_address, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cooperation_agency c
and c.agency_name like concat('%',#{agency.agencyName},'%')
mapper.insert: insert into cooperation_agency (agency_name, agency_type, contact_person, contact_phone, supply_type, intern_post, bank_account_name, bank_name, bank_account, service_fee_mode, service_fee_amount, settle_cycle, tax_type, agency_address, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{agencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agencyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{internPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceFeeMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceFeeAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{settleCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agencyAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into cooperation_agency
agency_name,
agency_type,
contact_person,
contact_phone,
supply_type,
intern_post,
bank_account_name,
bank_name,
bank_account,
service_fee_mode,
service_fee_amount,
settle_cycle,
tax_type,
agency_address,
remark,
create_time,
update_time,
#{agencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{agencyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contactPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{supplyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update cooperation_agency
agency_name = #{agencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agency_type = #{agencyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_person = #{contactPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contact_phone = #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supply_type = #{supplyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
intern_post = #{internPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
service_fee_mode = #{serviceFeeMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
service_fee_amount = #{serviceFeeAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
settle_cycle = #{settleCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tax_type = #{taxType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
agency_address = #{agencyAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update cooperation_agency set agency_name = #{agencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, agency_type = #{agencyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_person = #{contactPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supply_type = #{supplyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, intern_post = #{internPost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account_name = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_fee_mode = #{serviceFeeMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_fee_amount = #{serviceFeeAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, settle_cycle = #{settleCycle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tax_type = #{taxType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, agency_address = #{agencyAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
